_capture_metadata.captured_from: Phi-4-mini-instruct-4bit on M5 Max via vllm-swift, captured 2026-05-05 during recovery validation
_capture_metadata.purpose: Regression guard: this is the EXACT shape Phi-4 actually produced when given a tool-call prompt and tool definitions but didn't emit the leak shape — it just chatted with a markdown code block and natural-language explanation. Recovery MUST NOT fire on this. The recovery feature is only useful if it doesn't false-positive on real production-shaped chat traffic.

message.content:
To list files in a directory using a bash tool, you can simply use the `ls` command on a Linux terminal. However, if you specifically want to use a custom tool, here's the syntax:

```bash
ls /tmp/sweep-test
```

This will display all files and subdirectories within `/tmp/sweep-test`. If you want a more detailed listing including hidden files and metadata, you can use `ls -la /tmp/sweep-test` instead.
